description: console.info("msg", {obj}) renders as "msg {}" in the Next 16 dev logger — the structured object is silently dropped. This bit us where a webhook paid-order log was the only durable trace of a sale. Separately, Next 16 refuses to start a second dev server on another port.
resolution: Serialise the object into the message string with JSON.stringify rather than passing it as a second argument. For dev servers, reuse the already-running one.
